vc_checking.summary: The representation-opening entailment is proofable, but both return witnesses are semantically invalid because the structural Assert loses the equality between the current program pointer linklist and its frozen entry value linklist_pre. The antecedents own the sentinel fields and xizi_dllseg at linklist, while both postconditions demand xizi_dll linklist_pre l for an unconstrained address.
required_annotation_rework: Preserve the unchanged parameter identity in the structural Assert, using the repository annotation pattern linklist == linklist@pre.
Rerun annotation checking and canonical symbolic execution so the return witnesses either substitute linklist_pre for linklist or carry a usable equality premise.
Re-run vc-checking on the new source_goal_version; all conclusions and the empty proving plan in this report become stale after regeneration.

vc_shape.post_spatial: sentinel node_next |-> first ** sentinel node_prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first linklist_pre linklist_pre last l

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: Use the existential first and last already packaged by the definition of xizi_dll.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Unfold xizi_dll once, select either identical disjunct of the generated goal, and reuse the three conjunctive spatial resources without changing their addresses or contents.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: No pure obligation remains after unfolding; PreH1 is unused.

used_existing_lemmas.name: xizi_dll
used_existing_lemmas.statement_shape: xizi_dll head nodes is definitionally EX first last, head.next |-> first ** head.prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first head head last nodes

witness_analyses.premise_discharge: Definitional unfolding supplies both existential witnesses and every post spatial resource directly from P.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: linklist.next |-> first ** linklist.prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first linklist linklist last l
vc_shape.post_pure: at least (l=nil -> 0=1), and in the stronger disjunct also (l<>nil -> 0=0)
vc_shape.post_exists: the first/last witnesses hidden inside xizi_dll linklist_pre l

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: The natural first/last values reconstruct xizi_dll linklist l, not xizi_dll linklist_pre l; no witness can change the head address demanded by the postcondition.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Impossible under the frozen VC. P owns fields at linklist, whereas Q requires fields at an arbitrary independently quantified linklist_pre.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: If the address identity were preserved, unfolding the nil case of xizi_dllseg would turn l=nil into first=linklist, contradicting PreH1. This handles the boolean fact but cannot repair the spatial head mismatch.
witness_analyses.premise_discharge: There is no premise in P equating linklist_pre and linklist. A helper lemma asserting the entailment would require this missing premise and therefore would be unsound.
witness_analyses.failure_signal: generated return VC dropped the unchanged parameter identity at the intermediate Assert boundary
witness_analyses.grouping_reason: annotation-bug witnesses must not enter a proving group

vc_shape.pre_spatial: linklist.next |-> first ** linklist.prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first linklist linklist last l
vc_shape.post_pure: at least (l<>nil -> 1=0), and in the stronger disjunct also (l=nil -> 1=1)
vc_shape.post_exists: the first/last witnesses hidden inside xizi_dll linklist_pre l

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: The existing first/last values can only reconstruct xizi_dll at linklist; linklist_pre remains unconstrained.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Impossible under the frozen VC for the same head-address mismatch as return_wit_1.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: After address identity is restored, first=linklist plus the separated sentinel fields rules out a nonempty xizi_dllseg whose first node would re-own the same sentinel fields; this establishes l=nil. That semantic path does not provide the missing linklist=linklist_pre premise.
witness_analyses.premise_discharge: No antecedent fact relates linklist_pre to linklist, so the required spatial postcondition is not derivable.
witness_analyses.failure_signal: generated return VC dropped the unchanged parameter identity at the intermediate Assert boundary
witness_analyses.grouping_reason: annotation-bug witnesses must not enter a proving group

natural_language_analysis.overall: P entails the representation opening at function entry. At return, P can reconstruct the same representation at the current linklist address, and the branch conditions are intended to characterize nil versus non-nil. However Q universally selects an unrelated linklist_pre address. Separation-logic ownership cannot be transported between unrelated addresses; this is a missing annotation equality, not a tactic or helper-lemma gap.
natural_language_analysis.countermodel_pattern: Choose linklist_pre distinct from linklist and a satisfiable heap containing only the sentinel fields and segment rooted at linklist. The post requires ownership of sentinel fields at linklist_pre, which the antecedent does not provide. This refutes each disjunct of each return witness independently.
diagnostics_hints_used: return_wit_1_split_goal_spatial isolates the invalid xizi_dll linklist_pre l reconstruction
return_wit_2_split_goal_spatial isolates the same invalid reconstruction
split_goal diagnostics were treated only as hints and were not included as target witnesses

group_plan.reason: Downstream proving is invalid when any target witness is an annotation-bug; the proofable entry witness is deliberately not dispatched alone. Regeneration must produce a new complete plan bound to the new source_goal_version.

witness_group_plan.reason: No proving handoff is valid until annotation repair and regeneration.
